search.query: eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=tenantDetails OR mso_api_endpoint=schemaTenants OR mso_api_endpoint=siteHealth | stats count by mso_host

p.i: Data is not available in selected time range or Orchestrator data collection is not configured. Try expanding the time range or configure the account: Configuration Page

search.query: |search name=$mso_site_token$ | dedup mso_site_id | rex field=urls "https://(?<url>.*)$" | mvexpand url | dedup apicSiteId | table name, platform, url

| dedup name |fillnull value="None" siteAssociations_siteId | rename name as "tenant_name",siteAssociations_siteId as "id" |mvexpand id | join type=outer id [| search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=siteHealth mso_host=$mso_token$| dedup id| fields id,name]| fillnull value="None" name | stats dc(tenant_name) as Count by name | sort 0 Count DESC |head 10 | rename name as "Site Name"

|fillnull value="None" userAssociations_userId | rename userAssociations_userId as "user_id" | mvexpand user_id | join type=outer user_id [| search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=userDetails mso_host=$mso_token$ | rename id as "user_id" | dedup user_id| fields user_id,username]| fillnull value="None" username | stats dc(name) as Count by username | sort 0 Count DESC |head 10 | rename username as "User Name"

| fillnull value="None" mso_schema_id | mvexpand mso_schema_id | join type=outer mso_schema_id [| search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=schemaDetails mso_host=$mso_token$|rename id as "mso_schema_id" | dedup mso_schema_id| fields mso_schema_id,displayName]| fillnull value="None" displayName | stats dc(name) as Count by displayName | sort 0 Count DESC |head 10 | rename displayName as "Schema Name"
| dedup mso_schema_id, displayName | stats dc(mso_schema_id) as Count by displayName | sort 0 -Count | head 10 | rename displayName as "Tenant Name"

| dedup id | join id type=outer [ search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=schemaTenants mso_host=$mso_token$ | fields id, mso_schema_id] | fillnull value="NA" mso_schema_id | eval associated=case(mso_schema_id == "NA", "Not Associated with Any Schema") | fillnull value="Associated with Schema" associated | stats count as Count by associated | rename associated as Associated
| dedup mso_site_id | stats count by name

| dedup name |fillnull value="None" username|fillnull value="None" siteAssociations_siteId | rename name as "tenant_name",siteAssociations_siteId as "id" |mvexpand id | join type=outer id [| search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=siteHealth mso_host=$mso_token$| dedup id| fields id,name]| fillnull value="None" name | join type=outer userAssociations_userId [| search eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=userDetails mso_host=$mso_token$ | dedup id | rename id as userAssociations_userId| table userAssociations_userId, username] | search name=$mso_site_token$ | table tenant_name, username,name, description | rename tenant_name as "Tenant Name", username as Username, description as Description, name as "Site Name" | fillnull value="-"

eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=msoAuditRecords type=tenant mso_host=$mso_token$| table timestamp, user_username,user_domainName, type, event | rename timestamp as "Timestamp", user_username as "Username",user_domainName as "Domain Name", type as "Type", event as "Event"
